conflict: Institutional absurdity meeting real-world demands; Sable's first encounter with action
consequence: The pursuit is organized; Sable begins her transformation; the Red Reserve is seeded as latent threat
must_land_beats: Sable's bureaucratic competence and field incompetence
The team of untrained level-300 agents — institutional absurdity at peak
Sable's first ability use and its complex emotional aftermath
The Red Reserve named and rejected as disproportionate — for now

payoffs_to_land.description: The Red Reserve is explicitly named and its nature clarified — a secret unit of Hoarded agents trained and permitted to spend for security purposes

pressure_source: Institutional absurdity meeting real-world demands; Sable's first encounter with action
secondary_character_beats: Lady Aldraste's political pressure felt through Council framing — retrieving Kem is institutional necessity, not parental rescue

setups_to_plant.description: The Council refuses to deploy the Red Reserve for a retrieval, framing it as an admission that inaction philosophy has failed — establishes trained spenders as an escalation the Hoarded are reluctant to authorize

state_shift: The pursuit is organized; Sable begins her transformation; the Red Reserve is seeded as latent threat
